summary.main_summary: This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement is between Acme Corporation and Beta Industries to facilitate the exploration of a potential business relationship while protecting each party's confidential information.
summary.tldr: This Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement is between Acme Corporation and Beta Industries to facilitate the exploration of a potential business relationship while protecting each party's confidential information.
key_points: Exploration of a potential business relationship

risks.title: Breach of Confidentiality
risks.description: If either party fails to maintain the confidentiality of the other party's proprietary information, it could lead to significant financial and reputational damage.

risks.title: Unauthorized Disclosure
risks.description: The Receiving Party's obligations to protect Confidential Information may be compromised if its employees or agents disclose such information without authorization.

standard_clauses.title: Confidential Information
standard_clauses.content: "Confidential Information" means any proprietary information disclosed by the Disclosing Party to the Receiving Party.

standard_clauses.title: Term
standard_clauses.content: The Receiving Party's obligations under this Agreement shall survive for a period of five (5) years from the date of disclosure.
